name: Ian Ozsvald
title: AI Consultant & Author
bio: In the AI and robotics domain for 25 years. Author of High Performance Python (now in third edition) and co-founder of PyData London 11 years ago (over 16K members). Involved in AI consulting for private equity and runs Playgroup, an event for deep dives into LLMs. Focused on the ARC-AGI challenge.
